zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱下行整理
zh.content:
当前SOL价格运行于65.7附近，明显低于20日均线67.5，整体结构偏弱，呈现低位震荡下行格局，短线反弹力度有限。

MACD数值为-0.63持续位于零轴下方，空头动能占优，虽缺少RSI数据，但从价格压制与动量表现看，市场仍偏向弱势整理。

下方关键支撑位在65.6-65.5区间，若跌破可能下探64.8；上方阻力先看66.1，高位则需突破67.5均线才能扭转结构。

操作上建议短线区间思路为主，未突破67.5前反弹偏空对待，激进者可在66附近分批试空，止损设于66.5上方。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently in a narrow consolidation phase with price action hovering around 65.69 after a mild daily decline of -0.61%. The structure reflects a short-term bearish bias, as price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 67.497. Recent candles show compression between 65.66 and 66.10, indicating reduced volatility but also a lack of bullish momentum. Overall trend remains neutral-to-bearish unless price reclaims higher resistance levels.

Momentum indicators reinforce this soft bearish outlook. The MACD reading at -0.6336 signals negative momentum, suggesting sellers still have slight control. Without a visible signal line value, confirmation remains partial, but price behavior aligns with downside pressure. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold clarity, yet trading below the SMA(20) typically implies weakened bullish strength. Market structure continues to favor range-bound downside drift unless momentum improves.

Key support is concentrated around 65.60, which has been repeatedly tested, making it an immediate floor. A breakdown could expose 65.00 as the next psychological level, followed by deeper support near 64.20. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 66.10, followed by the SMA(20) at 67.50, which is the critical recovery threshold. A break above this zone would be required to shift sentiment back toward a constructive trend.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor cautious range strategies rather than aggressive trend chasing. Short positions may be considered on rejection near 66.10 with tight risk control above 67.00. Conversely, long setups become more attractive only on a confirmed reclaim of the SMA(20), ideally with expanding volume. Until then, price action suggests patience, with emphasis on breakout confirmation rather than anticipation.
